reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the need for a new field in the memory controller data structure and suggested using an existing one instead. Also questioned the necessity of updating multiple functions to use the new byte-based tracking.

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch series modifies the memory controller to track MEMCG_ZSWAPPED in bytes, enabling sub-PAGE_SIZE granularity charging for compressed objects stored at the boundary of two zspages. The change involves updating various data structures and functions to use the new byte-based tracking.
